title: grammitis hessii
intro: Grammitis hessii, also known as Polypodium hessii, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae, commonly found in the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Grammitis hessii is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be used in salves and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
